title: Trigonotis microcarpa
taxonomy: Trigonotis microcarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is native to China and belongs to the genus Trigonotis. The Trigonotis genus is a part of the Boraginaceae family, which consists of about 1,500 species of flowering plants. Trigonotis microcarpa is a type of herbaceous plant, and its classification is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae. More specifically, its classification is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Boraginales, family Boraginaceae, genus Trigonotis, species T. microcarpa.

intro: Trigonotis microcarpa, also known as small-fruited trigonotis, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing oxidative stress and alleviating symptoms of certain conditions.
